outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran vows to retaliate against US if ships face further attacks during ceasefire
outlets.summary: CNN covers IRGC Naval Command's threat of 'heavy assault against one of the American centers' if US continues disabling Iranian tankers. IRGC Aerospace says missiles and drones 'locked onto the enemy.'

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: U.S. intelligence says Iran can outlast Trump's blockade for months
outlets.summary: WaPo reports on leaked CIA assessment that Iran retains 75% of mobile launchers and 70% of missile stockpiles. Can survive blockade for 3-4 months. Contradicts White House claims of overwhelming military pressure.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The U.S. fires on Iranian tankers trying to evade its blockade amid a Hormuz standoff
outlets.summary: NPR reports US Navy F/A-18s disabled Iranian tankers Sea Star III and Sevda. Also covers UAE reporting fresh Iranian missile and drone attack — 3 civilians wounded.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says US strikes on Iran were a 'love tap,' warns of Project Freedom Plus
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump's 'love tap' description of US strikes and threat of expanded 'Project Freedom Plus.' Frames as tough diplomacy: Trump holds cards while awaiting Iran's response to deal.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump blockade squeezing Iran so hard regime may be dumping oil into Gulf
outlets.summary: Fox frames 45 sq km oil spill near Kharg Island as evidence Trump's blockade is working. Experts speculate Iran may be dumping oil. Iran denies, calls it 'psychological warfare.'

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel kills 23 in Lebanon as US awaits Iran's reply to deal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covers Israel's deadly day in Lebanon (23 killed), Hezbollah cross-border strikes, IRGC threats, Russia resupplying Iran, UK deploying HMS Dragon, and oil spill at Kharg Island.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: The war on Iran will likely end in American retreat
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera opinion piece argues US blockade is unsustainable. Iran can outlast it for months (CIA assessment). Russia resupplying via Caspian. Consumer sentiment at record low. Historical parallels to US overextension.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: UK deploys HMS Dragon to Gulf for potential Strait of Hormuz mission
outlets.summary: BBC/UK Defence Journal reports UK redeploying Type 45 destroyer to Gulf for UK/France-led 40-nation escort mission. Strictly defensive — for when hostilities subside. France carrier Charles de Gaulle in Red Sea.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: In Iran War, Echoes of a Disaster That Shook Israel 25 Years Ago
outlets.summary: Haaretz draws parallels between current Iran war and historical Israeli military failures. Analysis of Lebanon ceasefire collapse and Israel's escalating multi-front campaign.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Russia sending Iran drone parts via Caspian Sea, bypassing Hormuz blockade
outlets.summary: ToI reports NYT findings on Russia shipping drone components to Iran via Caspian ports. Iran lost 60% of drone arsenal. Ships turning off AIS transponders to avoid detection.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF strikes 85 Hezbollah sites after Hezbollah launches cross-border drone attacks
outlets.summary: JPost reports IDF struck 85+ Hezbollah sites in 24 hours after Hezbollah claimed 26 attacks including 2 cross-border strikes into Israel — first since April ceasefire. 3 IDF reservists wounded at Mt. Meron.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Caspian Sea becomes key trade route for Russia-Iran amid Hormuz blockade
outlets.summary: Iran International reports Russia shipping drone components to Iran via Caspian Sea ports, bypassing Hormuz blockade. Iran lost 60% of drone arsenal. Also sending food and raw materials through 4 Caspian ports.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran FM: missile reserves at 120% capacity — warns US of consequences
outlets.summary: Iranian state media amplifies Araghchi's claim of '120% missile capacity' and IRGC's 'heavy assault' threat. FM spokesman calls Trump remarks 'whimsical adventurism.' Frames Iran as militarily strong despite blockade.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Khamenei adviser: Hormuz is equivalent to an atomic bomb — Iran will not forfeit war gains
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Mohammad Mokhber's statement as Iran asserting sovereignty. Iran seeks to change legal regime of Hormuz. Positions blockade leverage as Iran's key negotiating asset.
